raw.problem: Crop insurers price risk blind because field data is stale.
raw.opportunity_size: Indian crop insurance ~$6B premium pool, largely manual.
raw.why_now: Satellite revisit + ML now gives weekly field truth.
raw.gtm: API per-acre risk score, billed per policy.
raw.success_scenario: If loss ratios improve, renewals are locked.
